privacy.title: Privacy Policy
s1_body: Glory Agency ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website glory.dpdns.org (the "Site").
Please read this policy carefully. If you do not agree with the terms, do not access the Site.
s2_body: We may collect personal identification information (name, email address, phone number, company name) when you voluntarily submit it through contact forms, quote requests, or account registration.

We also automatically collect certain non-personal information when you visit the Site, including your IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, and browsing behavior through cookies and similar technologies.
s3_body: The information we collect is used to provide, maintain, and improve our services; respond to your inquiries and requests; send marketing and promotional communications (with your consent); personalize your experience on the Site; and comply with legal obligations.
We process your data based on legitimate business interests, contractual necessity, or your explicit consent where required.
s4_body: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience. Essential cookies are necessary for the Site to function. Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the Site. Marketing cookies track your activity across websites to deliver relevant advertisements.
You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect your experience on the Site.
s5_body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating the Site and conducting our business (e.g., hosting, analytics, payment processing), provided they agree to keep your information confidential.
We may also disclose information if required by law, to protect our rights, or in connection with a business transfer (merger, acquisition, or sale of assets).
s6_body: We retain your personal information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, or as required by applicable law. When data is no longer needed, it is securely deleted or anonymized.
s7_body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, update, or delete your personal information; object to or restrict processing; request data portability; and withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.
To exercise these rights, contact us at info@glory.dpdns.org. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
s8_body: The Site may contain links to third-party websites not operated by us. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies before providing any personal information.
s9_body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
s10_body: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: info@glory.dpdns.org

terms.title: Terms of Service
s1_body: By accessing or using the Glory Agency website (glory.dpdns.org) and our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our Site or services.
We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
s2_body: Glory Agency provides advertising, marketing, design, printing, and digital development services. Detailed descriptions of our offerings are available on the Site. All services are subject to a separate agreement or statement of work unless otherwise specified.
s3_body: When you create an account on our Client Portal, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities under your account. You must provide accurate, current, and complete information.
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or engage in unauthorized activities.
s4_body: All content on the Site — including text, graphics, logos, images, software, and design — is the property of Glory Agency or our licensors and is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.

Upon full payment for services, ownership of final deliverables (designs, websites, marketing materials) is transferred to the client. Glory Agency retains the right to display completed work in our portfolio unless otherwise agreed in writing.
s5_body: Clients agree to provide timely feedback, necessary materials, and accurate information required for project completion. Delays caused by the client may affect project timelines.
Clients must not use our services for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws or regulations.
s6_body: Payment terms are specified in individual project agreements or invoices. Unless otherwise agreed, payments are due within the stated period. Late payments may incur additional charges or result in service suspension.
All prices are in EGP (Egyptian Pound) unless otherwise stated. Taxes may apply as required by law.
s7_body: Cancellation requests must be submitted in writing. Refund eligibility depends on the stage of work completed. Custom-designed materials and digital deliverables are generally non-refundable once work has commenced.
Each project's refund terms are detailed in the respective agreement. We handle cancellations on a case-by-case basis with fairness to both parties.
s8_body: Glory Agency shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our services, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the total amount paid by the client for the specific service giving rise to the claim.
s9_body: You agree to indemnify and hold Glory Agency harmless from any claims, losses, damages, liabilities, or expenses arising from your use of the Site, violation of these terms, or infringement of any third-party rights.
s10_body: Our services may integrate with third-party tools and platforms (e.g., Google, Meta, WhatsApp). We are not responsible for the availability, functionality, or terms of these third-party services.
s11_body: Both parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of proprietary information shared during the course of the business relationship. This obligation survives termination of the agreement.
s12_body: Either party may terminate a service agreement by providing written notice as specified in the individual contract. Glory Agency reserves the right to refuse service to any client at our discretion, subject to refund of unearned fees.
s13_body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Any disputes arising under these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Egypt.
s14_body: We may revise these Terms of Service at any time. Changes are effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance. We encourage you to review these terms periodically.
s15_body: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at: info@glory.dpdns.org
